linkedin.text:
You don't need a finished plan. You need a partner who's done this 200+ times.

Most teams stall at step one — too many destinations, no budget anchor, no idea what's actually realistic. That hesitation costs weeks.

So this week we're opening free 30-minute planning calls. In half an hour we'll pressure-test your destination shortlist, ballpark a budget per head, and flag the travel dates that quietly save you money.

Across 120+ countries and 200+ events, the pattern is always the same: the teams who move first get the better venues and the better rates. No pitch deck, no obligation — just clarity you can take straight back to your boss.

Slots are limited this week. Book via the link, or DM "CALL" and we'll set it up.

#CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #EventStrategy
